chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr.B.A.No.S-131 of 2023 (Mumtaz and others Vs. The State). DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of bail application. 17.04.2023. Mr. Abid Hussain Kalhoro, Advocate for the applicants. Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, D.P.G for the State. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicants by way of statement withdraws the instant bail application which is not opposed by learned D.P.G for the State; it is dismissed as withdrawn. Office is directed to return the surety papers to the surety on proper verification. JUDGE
